items: Deterministic memory operations via Python CLI (amnesia.py)
Commands .md are thin orchestrators, Claude handles semantic work
Entity memory stored as JSON in .claude/amnesia/memory/
Schema migration from etl-client-memory-v1 to amnesia-entity
amnesia.py never writes to native memory, Claude does via commands
Mapping: current_status to project, decisions to feedback, metadata to reference
items and technical_notes are NOT synced to native memory (REQ-024)
Index limit warning at 180 lines (native truncates at 200)
Session logs in sessions/YYYY-MM-DD.md provide temporal context between conversations — what was done, when, and what is pending
Plugin installed via /plugin install from GitHub marketplace, reloaded with /reload-plugins

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: amnesia.py only reads native memory; writing delegated to Claude via its native memory mechanism

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: Bidirectional sync: amnesia reads native context on load, Claude writes native after save

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: Selective mapping: status->project, decisions->feedback, metadata->reference; items and notes excluded

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: Unified save flow: /amnesia save writes both entity memory and session log — removed separate /amnesia project command

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: argument-hint frontmatter field shows CLI autocomplete hints for command arguments

last_session.summary: Unified save flow (entity+session), fixed --project-root flag position, added argument-hint to command, removed /amnesia project command, updated all docs

technical_notes: sync subcommand needs --project-root on its own subparser (argparse quirk)
_parse_frontmatter uses simple key:value parsing, not full YAML library
argparse.SUPPRESS on subparser --project-root prevents child defaults from overriding parent parsed values
commands/amnesia/project.md removed — session save is always part of unified /amnesia save flow
